name: Sweet and Sour Soybeans
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Green Peppers, Sweet, Fresh, Seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare sweet-sour sauce and reserve.
2. In a bowl combine 1-1/2 teaspoons each cornstarch, soy sauce, and dry sherry; 1/2 cup each brown sugar and wine vinegar; and 1/3 cup vegetable stock.
3. Heat oil in a wide frying pan over high heat.
4. Add onion, carrots, and garlic to the pan and cook, stirring for about 3 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Add green pepper and cook for an additional minute.
6. Add pineapple, tomatoes, and soybeans to the pan and cook for 2 more minutes or until hot.
7. Stir in the sweet-sour sauce, pour it into the pan, and continue cooking, stirring, until the sauce bubbles and thickens.
